artwork_description:
Character: Mega Chandelure resembles a floating, elegant chandelier with a glass body that is largely spherical. Its overall shape is reminiscent of a traditional chandelier, adorned with long, graceful arms that extend outward. The arms are slender and taper into curling, wispy ends that imply movement. The face is subtly integrated into the upper part of the round body, lacking distinct facial features but suggesting an ethereal presence. Its eyes are not prominently visible, giving it a ghostly appearance. The flames emanate from the ends of the arms, appearing as flickering purple wisps that enhance its spectral quality.

Artwork: This illustration captures Mega Chandelure in a dynamic pose, slightly angled as if drifting through space. The composition is framed to highlight the figure, set against a dark background filled with soft gradients and scattered light points that give a sense of depth and mystery. The colors are mainly dark with prominent purples, adding to the ghostly ambiance. Glowing highlights accentuate the contours of the chandelier body and flames, creating an ethereal atmosphere. The lighting suggests a subtle illumination from within, enhancing the delicate beauty of the subject while establishing a somewhat eerie mood.
